title: osteospermum spinosum var. runcinatum
intro: Osteospermum spinosum var. runcinatum, also known as the Barberton daisy, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of South Africa. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, where its leaves and stems are believed to possess medicinal properties that may help alleviate inflammation and reduce fever. The health benefits associated with Osteospermum spinosum var. runcinatum include its potential to soothe digestive issues and provide relief from headaches, in addition to its antioxidant properties which may help protect against cell damage. Osteospermum spinosum var. runcinatum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of ailments.
